scripts.serve:firestore: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --project demo-fm-budget-control --only auth,firestore,functions --import ./emulator-data --export-on-exit ./emulator-data
scripts.serve:auth: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --project demo-fm-budget-control --only auth,functions --import ./emulator-data --export-on-exit ./emulator-data
scripts.serve:functions: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --project demo-fm-budget-control --only functions --import ./emulator-data --export-on-exit ./emulator-data
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-fm-budget-control --only auth,firestore,functions "node integration/registration.integration.mjs"
